title: Option to disable Forms from being index by Google
excerpt:
Forms are currently indexed by Google if you search on Google for it: site:forms.monday.com. 
Depending on the goal, I’d rather not have my form indexed. 
Adding  as an option could solve this.

posts.author: robin (robin)
posts.cookedHtml:
Forms are currently indexed by Google if you search on Google for it: site:forms.monday.com.
Depending on the goal, I’d rather not have my form indexed.

Adding as an option could solve this.
Can you implement this?

Thanks.
